comment: Per-claim ratification decisions — what the M3 ratification UI will produce (UI is a later milestone; M3 proves the seal logic + the fail-closed boundary). Each surviving Judgment gets a disposition: ratify | amend | defer | drop. A claim with NO disposition is 'pending' and CANNOT export.

dispositions.amended_text: Security-hardening spend is under-allocated at 24% vs the 40% OKR target; recommend reallocating one engineer's Opus budget next month.
